nodes.name: measuring-text.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill reference on measuring text dimensions, fitting text to a target width, and detecting overflow, with best-practice notes for canvas-based text sizing.

nodes.name: parameters.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill reference on Studio-editable parameters/props, including how to expose a color-picker control for schema-driven props.

nodes.name: sequencing.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill reference covering premounting, `<Series>` (including overlaps), frame references inside sequences, and nesting sequences or compositions to build layered timelines.

nodes.name: sfx.md
nodes.summary: Short vendored Remotion agent-skill guide on placing and timing sound-effect (SFX) cues within a composition.

nodes.name: silence-detection.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill guide on adaptive silence detection in audio tracks using `loudnorm` and threshold-based analysis, including identifying leading/trailing silence and applying results with Remotion's `<Video>` component.

nodes.name: text-highlights.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill reference describing techniques for highlighting portions of text (e.g., word-by-word emphasis) within a composition.

nodes.name: timing.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill reference on Studio-editable animation timing patterns, Bezier easing curves with copy-paste examples, easing direction for enter/exit animations, and composing interpolations.

nodes.name: transitions.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive vendored Remotion agent-skill reference on `TransitionSeries`: transition and overlay examples, mixing transitions with overlays, available transition types (including slide direction), timing options, and total composition duration calculation.

nodes.name: trimming.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill guide explaining how to trim the beginning, end, or both ends of a clip, and how to combine trimming with a start delay.

nodes.name: video-editing.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill guide covering independently positioned clips and ripple editing using `TransitionSeries` for non-destructive video-editing workflows.

nodes.name: voiceover.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Remotion agent-skill guide for adding AI-generated voiceover to a composition: generating audio via ElevenLabs, computing dynamic composition duration with `calculateMetadata`, rendering the audio component, and delaying audio start.
